commit_message:
Post process trace Post process trace Script to post process cycle-accurate HW trace to generate more human-friendly instruction by instruction execution trace.

This script takes the HW trace like this:
```
   56900  0  1: BUBBLE                                       | FP_BUBBLE                      |                              | 
   56920  0  1: BUBBLE                                       | FP_BUBBLE                      |                              | 
   56940  0  1: BUBBLE
```
